title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at HUDCO

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at HUDCO
jsonLd.description:
HUDCO, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Real Estate Agent for our Lucknow operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About HUDCO:
HUDCO is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HUDCO!
